node.statement: (Definition of face dimension spectrum and gap). For a unital *-algebra A, define the face dimension spectrum Spec(A) = {dim(F_{S(A)}(φ)) : φ ∈ S(A)} ⊆ N_0 ∪ {∞}. Note 0 ∈ Spec(A) always (pure states exist by Krein-Milman). The face dimension gap G(A) = {d ∈ N_{>0} : d ∉ Spec(A)} is the set of positive integers that do not appear as face dimensions. Equivalently, by the face-commutant correspondence, Spec(A) = {dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) - 1 : φ ∈ S(A)}, so d ∈ Spec(A) iff there exists a representation of A whose commutant has self-adjoint real dimension d + 1.
